name: Formal Install Troubleshooting With Missing Details
description: A methodical customer reports that a newly installed device is not functioning but omits key diagnostic details at first. The agent should gather the missing information and provide structured troubleshooting guidance without escalation.
initialMessage: Good afternoon. I completed the installation yesterday, and the unit is still not operating correctly. I would like assistance determining what I should check next.
expectedOutcome: The agent asks clarifying questions about the installation symptoms, gathers enough detail to identify the issue type, and gives a clear next-step troubleshooting plan tailored to the user's situation.
